title: exomologeo #1843
definition:
1) to confess
 2) to profess
    2a) acknowledge openly and joyfully
    2b) to one's honour: to celebrate, give praise to
    2c) to profess that one will do something, to promise, agree, engage
nasbUsage:

 2) to profess
